resume.summary:
Greetings, I am Mario Larsen.
Welcome to my online blog.
Would you like to gain deeper insights into my journey ?
resume.subTitle:
Youthful and motivated French Engineer,
actively seeking enriching opportunities in AI research,
Web and Mobile Development, and Electronic Design
resume.subTitleFull: Youthful and motivated French Engineer, actively seeking enriching opportunities in AI research, Web and Mobile Development, and Electronic Design

ensea.name: ENSEA, École Nationale Supérieure de l'Électronique et de ses Applications
ensea.text: Prestigious institution specializing in electrical engineering, computer science, and communication networks. Spearheaded lots of ambitious projects, including a Reinforcement Learning Solver and a Relation Network Video Classifier
ensea.result: Graduated with honors, majoring in signal processing and artificial intelligence

civ.name: CIV, Centre International de Valbonne
civ.text: Intensive preparatory program dedicated for competitive exams at top-tier French engineering schools (Grandes Écoles)
civ.result: Attained qualification for Centrale-Supélec, Mines-Télécom, and Concours Communs Polytechniques schools

parc.name: Parc Impérial
parc.result: Received Baccalaureate specializing in sciences with an emphasis on advanced mathematics, achieving honors equivalent to A-levels

galadrim.name: GALADRIM
galadrim.result: Developed and deployed 7 sophisticated web and mobile applications, showcasing versatility and proficiency

cea.name: CEA-LIST / DIASI: AI Department in Laboratory
cea.objective: Led the unification of detection and re-identification within an innovative deep network architecture for multifaceted object tracking
cea.result: Championed a groundbreaking 'visual transformer' algorithm, surpassing baseline models in performance

ljubljana.name: University of Ljubljana
ljubljana.objective: Conducted an independent, comprehensive study and implementation of Virtual Try-On Networks
ljubljana.result: Generated a meticulously detailed technical report addressing CP-VTON failures, quality assessments, dataset analyses, and innovative updates

themis.name: ENSEA Laboratories, Themis
themis.text: Distinguished collaborative project assigned to a cohort of ENSEA students across three years of the engineering cycle
themis.objective: Championed the end-to-end design of an innovative electronic musical instrument, encompassing synthesizer and drum-machine functionalities
themis.result: Independently executed three PCB designs for the synthesizer's core board, demonstrating technical prowess and autonomous initiative

resume.interestText: Passionate about continuous learning, AI implementation, filmmaking, app development, neurology, mathematics, poetry, and associations

interests.text: because passionate about continuous learning, proactive creation, and effective knowledge sharing, my diverse interests include :

interestsList.implementation: AI implementation, futurism, and doomsday prediction
interestsList.development: Mobile game and web-app design, development, and innovation
interestsList.psl: Conducting engaging and enlightening PSL presentations
interestsList.film: Engaging in film direction, production, critique, and collaboration for academic and personal projects
interestsList.delegate: Exemplifying leadership as a dedicated school delegate and secretary
interestsList.running: Maintaining a rigorous routine of running and cycling
interestsList.association: Active participation in pivotal roles for various associations, spanning president, team manager, event organizer, and debate master for student life, international film festivals, gaming events, public debates, international conferences, and hackathons
interestsList.courses: Pursuing advanced coursework ranging from neurology and advanced mathematics to fundamental physics, poetry, and epistemology

portfolio.summary:
I have done lots of projects before this blog and I will try to list them all here. 

At some point, some may received there own page

Until then, be carefull, I'm not proud of all of them

mslab.title: MS4's Needle Depth Servo-Control
mslab.text: During my first professional experience, an internship, I gained profound insights into a company's operations. Immersed in the role of an R&D engineer, I undertook a project to design, construct, and test a control board for adjusting the sampling needle depth in their MS4 blood analyzer. Over a span of 5 weeks, I autonomously produced a functional analysis report, an Eagle board, a Spice simulation, a functional prototype, and a comprehensive test report.

themis.title: Themis Analog Synthesizer Board
themis.text: Themis, a collaborative project, engaged a team of around twenty ENSEA students across different engineering years. Our objective was to design a complete electronic musical instrument with features of a synthesizer and a drum machine. My focus during a semester was on the main board design for the synthesizer. The culmination was the delivery of 3 meticulously crafted PCB designs that synthesized the contributions of numerous team members. The final designs were assembled and rigorously tested even amid the challenges of a pandemic.

virtualTryOn.title: Exploration of Virtual Try-On Networks
virtualTryOn.text: Embedded in the AI-focused research environment of the University of Ljubljana, I delved into the realm of artificial intelligence applied to visual processing. My internship concentrated on the study, reimplementation, and analysis of Virtual Try-On Networks. I researched their shortcomings, devised quality assessment measures, explored datasets, and implemented over 30 approaches using both Python and MATLAB, thus contributing significantly to the ongoing research.

pacman.title: AI-Driven Pac-Man
pacman.text: As part of my pursuit of AI expertise, I developed 12 iterations of a Python-based Pac-Man environment. These iterations catered to human players and facilitated OpenAI training. To gain a profound understanding of reinforcement learning, I reengineered the entire codebase using TensorFlow. Through environment rendering, I observed successful learning outcomes, as the AI adeptly avoided obstacles and ghosts, albeit with certain limitations.

sorting.title: Interactive Recycling Assistant
sorting.text: A collaborative effort among a team of four yielded a prototype that revolutionizes recycling by making it engaging and user-friendly. Our innovation comprises a camera equipped with a deep learning algorithm, capable of identifying the type and material of waste. Clear disposal instructions are then presented. An Arduino unit orchestrates the opening of relevant bins. Our fully functional prototype earned us recognition and accolades from the judging panel.

cloudModel.title: Cloud Formation Simulation
cloudModel.text: A pivotal project during my preparatory school tenure involved exploring the intricacies of cloud formation. Through a Python program, I introduced a novel perspective on the evolution of macro water particles as they traverse from the sea to the stratosphere. This effort earned me a commendable score in national exams.

tyo.title: Team Management and Festival Leadership
tyo.text: Since its inception in 1991, TYO has annually orchestrated a two-day short film extravaganza. Operating as an ENSEA student association, each year brought fresh faces to the team. In 2019, I undertook diverse responsibilities, including poster design using Photoshop, management, organization, and communication coordination. Additionally, I curated monthly film screenings under the TYO banner at the school.

attenuator.title: LM1971 M Audio Attenuator
attenuator.text: A brief yet insightful endeavor, this project involved a pair of students collaborating over half a semester. Our mission centered around fundamental sound manipulations – amplification and attenuation. Using the LM1971 M chip, we developed a system divided into phases: computer-controlled chip manipulation via Arduino, PCB communication setup, DIY fabrication encompassing ordering, printing, drilling, and welding, and finally, rigorous testing accompanied by iterative enhancements.

snake.title: Multiplayer Snake Game
snake.text: Enjoy a multiplayer rendition of the classic Snake game, allowing online play with a friend. Developed based on the HungryTurtleCode project.

sudoku.title: Sudoku Puzzle Solver
sudoku.text: My inaugural leisure project, the Sudoku Solver, paved the way for subsequent endeavors centered around solving this engaging puzzle game.

solitaire.title: Solitaire Winning Probability Evaluator
solitaire.text: To ascertain the winnability of randomly generated Solitaire games, I engineered a program to calculate winning probabilities, thereby facilitating strategic insights.

nonogram.title: Nonogram Enigma Resolver
nonogram.text: Dedicated to decoding Nonogram puzzles, this project aims to unravel their patterns and construct new challenges.

mastermind.title: MasterMind Strategy Solver
mastermind.text: Delving into the realm of code-breaking, this initiative centers on devising optimal strategies for the game of MasterMind.

coinflip.title: Coin Flip Cheaters Bot
coinflip.text: Presenting a Coin Flip Cheaters bot designed to secure victories in the Primer game competition. My independent creation briefly claimed the top spot, thanks to its prowess in the game.

wikimpostor.title: Wikimpostor Gaming App
wikimpostor.text: Introducing the Wikimpostor app, bringing the 'Two of these people are lying' game from The Technical Difficulties channel to the realm of Android gaming.

tetris.title: Enhanced Tetris Experience
tetris.text: Elevate your Tetris gameplay with the enhanced MODE feature, providing the option to customize your gaming experience.

minecraft.title: Minecraft with Rhombic Dodecahedra
minecraft.text: Embark on a novel iteration of Minecraft, where the traditional cubes are replaced with intriguing rhombic dodecahedra.

findwater.title: Find Water - The Geo Quiz
findwater.text: Engage in a 3D quiz game app, primed for enhancing your geographical knowledge. While currently focused on identifying bodies of water, the app's evolution is promising.

zeta.title: Visualizing Zeta Riemann Function
zeta.text: Experience the beauty of the Riemann Zeta function through dynamic visualizations generated by this home project.

youtubesubs.title: Youtube Subs Mosaic Generator
youtubesubs.text: Unleash the creative potential of your YouTube subscriptions by generating captivating mosaic images using this utility.

intro.title: What Is Minesweeper
intro.text:
Welcome to the captivating world of Minesweeper! 

This classic puzzle game challenges your logic and deduction skills as you navigate through a grid full of hidden mines. 

Your task is to uncover the safe tiles while avoiding the explosive mines lurking beneath. 

Exercise caution and strategic thinking to reveal the numbers that indicate the nearby mines, and clear the board to emerge as the victorious Minesweeper!

rules.title: How to play
rules.text:
The game is played on a grid of covered tiles. 

Your objective is to uncover all the safe tiles without detonating any mines. 

Clicking on a tile reveals either a number, indicating the number of mines adjacent to it, or a mine, which ends the game. 

Use the numbers as clues to deduce the locations of the mines. 

Right-click on tiles to place flags where you suspect mines are located. 

To win, uncover all safe tiles, flag all mines correctly, and avoid clicking on any mines.
